tiktok.caption: That free trial asked for your card for a reason — and it had nothing to do with your convenience

youtube_short.title: Free Trials Are Designed to Drain $1,200/Year
title_alternatives: Why Free Trials Always Need Your Credit Card
The Free Trial Psychology Trap Costing You $1,183/Year
youtube_short.description: That free trial form wasn't built for your convenience — it was built so you'd forget to cancel. Companies deliberately set 7-14 day windows, design 7-screen cancellation mazes, and count on 48% of people never noticing the charge. The average American is carrying 3.4 of these forgotten subscriptions right now, draining $1,183 a year. Pull up your bank statement, look for any charge under $15, and bet you find one you forgot. #moneytips #personalfinance #freetrial #moneypsychology #savemoney

hook_line: Free trials ask for your card for one reason — and it's not your convenience
